.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven-bundled JDK 11 to a standalone JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21 runtime.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; running on JDK 11 would cause runtime incompatibility or prevent usage of new language features.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian-based package manager (apt-get) with Alpine's package manager (apk) to match the new base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not have apt-get; using apt-get would result in a build failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update Node.js installation method from NodeSource script to NVM to ensure compatibility with Alpine and specific version control.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous NodeSource setup script for Ubuntu/Debian is incompatible with Alpine Linux, causing installation failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven by default.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the Java application; without it, the 'mvn' command will fail.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or tools in the Alpine environment.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some native dependencies or tools (like Node.js or Maven plugins) may require libstdc++ on Alpine; missing it causes runtime linking errors.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Configure NVM environment variables and install specific Node.js version to ensure consistent frontend build environment.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Without explicit Node.js version management, the build might fail due to missing or incompatible Node.js versions in the minimal Alpine image.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update PATH to include the newly installed Node.js binaries so they are accessible in subsequent steps.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Without updating PATH, the 'node' and 'npm' commands will not be found, causing build failures.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add build steps to copy source code and run Maven package command to create the application JAR.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous Dockerfile did not build the application inside the container; this change ensures the application is compiled and packaged for the new environment.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app
RUN mvn -B -Pproduction -Ph2 -DskipTests -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the specific application JAR.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to run the application, not just provide a shell; the previous CMD was likely for debugging or incomplete.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the explicit framework configuration for react-webpack5, which is required in newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; dependency resolution or runtime class conflicts will occur.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation API dependency to resolve missing classes during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE 10 (jakarta.validation), but legacy code or libraries might still reference javax.validation; adding this ensures compatibility if not fully migrated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 for better compatibility.
Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration.
Add Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Add explicit mainClass configuration to Spring Boot Maven plugin.
Add Maven Jar plugin configuration to make the jar executable.
Add new Maven profiles for wiremock, integration, and production environments.
Update artifact ID and group ID to reflect new project structure.
Add descriptive comments to pom.xml sections for better readability.
